heading: Omitted
label: 161 to 174 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections provided for the National Training School for Girls. , , provided that no new commitments to the National Training School for Girls should be made after . , , redesignated the National Training School for Girls as the Industrial Home School for Colored Girls and authorized construction of a new Industrial Home School for Colored Children near Laurel, Maryland. , , provided that the Industrial Home School for Colored Girls shall be combined with and become a part of the Industrial Home School for Colored Children.
